summary: Iteration 4 (S/A/O restored + Hero CTA removed + Archive emphasis) fully passes. Backend: 39/39 pytest tests green including 4 new tests for stage situation/actions/outcome (demo non-empty, backfill defaults missing keys to '', PUT persistence, main default preserves S/A/O). Frontend: Home career-map renders SITUATION/ACTIONS/OUTCOME labeled blocks + related project chips + view-archive button; hero shows no CTA buttons; Admin has S/A/O textareas that persist edits after save+reload; Admin Hero editor has NO hero-cta-* fields; Archive ?stage=enterprise-ai emphasizes medical-literature + enterprise-workflow with 已選取 badge (opacity 1) and dims others (opacity 0.32); archive-clear-filter returns to full list; Archive ?project=teaching-condense selects only that project; Archive no-params exhibits scroll-focus (unique opacities 0.32 and 1). Cleaned up TEST_ profiles + reset main to demo.
critical_code_review_comments: DEFAULT_CONTENT.hero.ctas array still exists in server.py:148-152 but is no longer surfaced by frontend HeroEditor or Hero UI. Consider removing to avoid confusion/orphan data (low priority - harmless).

ArchivePage with viewport-tall pages will emphasize a card immediately due to useInView with rootMargin -42%; the spec's 'initially all cards normal' will be observed only when the viewport is much shorter than total list height. Behavior is correct for realistic viewports; noted for reference only.
seed_data_creation: None persisted; test profiles auto-cleaned via teardown_class + explicit cleanup curl; main profile reset to demo.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 iteration-4 changes verified: (1) S/A/O restored on stage model + shown on Home + editable in Admin; (2) Hero CTA fully removed from Admin + frontend; (3) Archive selection/scroll-focus emphasis with opacity 0.32 dim + cyan glow + 已選取 badge. Backend backfill correctly defaults missing S/A/O to empty string. If future iterations touch these areas, re-run backend_test.py + the archive Playwright checks in iteration_4.
